data.title: Europe in economic distress as tensions with Russia, China, and U.S. rise, resembling "Mean Girls" scenario.
data.description: Europe currently faces strained relationships with major global powers, with tensions rising with Russia, China, and the U.S. This situation mirrors the dynamics of the popular movie "Mean Girls," where Europe seems to be caught in the middle of international rivalries. The continent must navigate these delicate relationships to ensure stability and cooperation on the global stage.

data.title: Digital Asset Technologies Inc. Announces Intention to Amend and Refile Financial Statements and MD&A
data.description: Vancouver-based company, Digital Asset Technologies Inc. (CSE: DATT) (OTCPK: DGTEF) (FSE: 9880), announced on April 10, 2026, that in response to a review by the British Columbia Securities Commission (BCSC), they plan to revise and refile specific financial statements and attached management’s discussion and analysis (MD&A). This decision stems from a continuous disclosure examination conducted by the BCSC.

data.title: Splashdown! Lockheed Martin-Built Orion Spacecraft Safely Returns Astronauts to Earth, Completing NASA's Artemis II Mission
data.description: In a significant milestone for space exploration, the first crewed deep space mission in over five decades has reaffirmed the viability of the Orion spacecraft for future lunar exploration. The Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT)-manufactured Orion craft completed a round trip of 694,481 miles to the Moon and back. The successful splashdown in the Pacific Ocean marks a crucial step towards advancing space missions and exploration.

data.title: Digital Asset Technologies Inc. Clarifying News Release
data.description: Digital Asset Technologies Inc. (CSE: DATT) (OTCPK: DGTEF) (FSE: 988) is a technology-focused investment issuer based in Vancouver, BC. The company has released a statement in compliance with the British Columbia Securities Commission's request to address inaccuracies in its previous news releases dated June 30, 2025 and May 7, 2025. This supplemental release aims to provide corrected and clarifying information regarding the Prior Disclosures made by the company earlier.

data.title: Autel Showcases Ultra-Fast EV Charging in Thailand, Combining 780A High-Current Performance with Seamless App Experience
data.description: In Bangkok, Autel Energy recently unveiled its ultra-fast EV charging solution at Beans2Cup@Ratchada, Thailand on April 10th, showcasing its efficiency to the public. This marks a significant development in the EV charging sector, with the deployment aiming to provide quicker and more convenient charging options. The live demonstration highlighted the technology's capabilities and its potential impact on the EV industry. This event underlines Autel Energy's dedication to promoting sustainable transportation solutions and advancing the adoption of EVs in the region.

data.title: Trade Desk Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of The Trade Desk, Inc. - TTD
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Louisiana Attorney General, who is now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that their firm has started probing into The Trade Desk, Inc. The investigation aims to analyze the activities of Trade Desk, a company based in New York and New Orleans. This move follows recent developments and involves a comprehensive examination into the company's operations. Charles C. Foti, Jr. and KSF are focused on gathering relevant data and scrutinizing the financial performance of Trade Desk to ensure transparency and accountability. The investigation will involve assessing various aspects of Trade Desk's business practices to ascertain any potential irregularities.

data.title: Bank executives alerted about Anthropic's powerful AI tech by Treasury secretary & Federal Reserve chair due to cyberthreat concerns.
data.description: In a rare occurrence, the Treasury Secretary and the Federal Reserve Chair called a meeting with bank executives to warn them about the dangers of cyberthreats resulting from artificial intelligence.

data.title: Sealaska Announces $29.7 Million Spring Distribution to Shareholders
data.description: In AAK'W KWÁAN (JUNEAU), Alaska, the Sealaska Board of Directors has given the go-ahead for a spring 2026 distribution totaling $29.7 million to be allocated to shareholders. This decision was made during a meeting on Friday. Shareholders can expect to receive this distribution on Thursday, April 16. It comprises $3 million in dividends from Sealaska's assets...

data.title: method® Transforms the Reset Moments at the Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival in Its Third Year as Official Body Wash, Shampoo and Conditioner Sponsor
data.description: method is back at the Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival for the third consecutive year, bringing innovative experiences and nostalgic elements to enhance the festival's middle portion. This year in COACHELLA VALLEY, California, method will transform middle moments of the festival into unique rituals using multisensory approaches. The festival, held on April 10, 2026, will see method showcasing its creativity with inventive activations.

data.title: Bunker Hill Announces Equity Compensation Grants
data.description: Bunker Hill Mining Corp., a mining company based in Kellogg, Idaho and Vancouver, British Columbia, recently approved the allocation of 163,674 restricted stock units (RSUs) for specific directors and officers. The RSUs are part of the amended and restated restricted stock unit incentive plan and will vest in increments over the next three years. They are valued at a deemed price of C$5.60 per share, based on the closing price on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) as of April 9, 2026. The RSUs will convert into common shares of the company and are set to vest on April 10 in the years 2027, 2028, and 2029.

data.title: CUPE members ratify a milestone agreement with the Region of Niagara's Long-Term Care facilities
data.description: In St. Catherines, Ontario, workers at Niagara Region’s municipally run long-term care facilities have approved a significant collective agreement. Represented by CUPE 1263, the workers secured notable enhancements including better paramedical benefits, increased vacation allowances, and higher pay for members. This outcome marks a departure from previous years when negotiations led to interest arbitration. Both the Region and CUPE 1263 engaged in free negotiations resulting in these positive changes.

data.title: COVU Launches COVU OS, the AI-native Operating Layer Rebuilding How Insurance Work Gets Done
data.description: In San Francisco, COVU unveiled COVU OS, the main operational component of its AI-based operating system for insurance distribution, as part of their growth strategy. Unlike traditional systems, COVU OS revolutionizes workflows by converting inbound requests into structured tasks and directing them to the optimal execution layer - be it AI, licensed agents, or offshore support - considering factors such as cost, compliance, and complexity. This reimagining addresses the longstanding issues within the insurance sector.

data.title: Sandisk Corporation to Join the Nasdaq-100 Index® Beginning April 20, 2026
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Nasdaq revealed that Sandisk Corporation (Nasdaq: SNDK) is set to join the Nasdaq-100 Index ® (NDX ®), taking the place of Atlassian Corporation (Nasdaq: TEAM). This change will be effective before the market opens on Monday, April 20, 2026. Sandisk's inclusion in this index signifies a significant shift in the market dynamics, with investors keeping a close eye on this development. The move reflects the ongoing changes in the stock market, indicating a potential impact on trading strategies and investment decisions. Stay tuned for updates as this adjustment takes effect.

data.title: DPC Dash - Domino's Pizza China Delivers Strong Expansion in Q1 2026, Highlighting Scalable & Replicable Store Economics
data.description: Domino's Pizza China, represented by DPC Dash Ltd, recently announced their ongoing success as the exclusive master franchisee for the Chinese mainland, Hong Kong, and Macau. The company, listed as 1405.HK, has continued to capitalize on growth opportunities in the region.
Trump: We’re not going to let Iran toll the Strait

WSJ: Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles in its arsenal that it could use by retrieving launchers from underground storage areas, according to American officials familiar with U.S. intelligence assessments.

Iran has been unable to fully open the Strait of Hormuz because it 'cannot locate all of the mines it laid in the waterway' and currently 'lacks the capability to remove them', according to New York Times report.
New York Times on officials: Iran lacks the capability to remove some mines in the Strait of Hormuz
The crewed Orion capsule of the Artemis II mission separates from the module to begin its free fall in the Pacific

data.title: Labor and Community Leaders Kick-Off Oakland's Yes on Measure E Campaign to Protect Essential Services & Keep Fire Stations Open
data.description: In Oakland, California on April 10, 2026, a coalition of labor groups from IFPTE Local 21, Oakland Firefighters, SEIU Local 1021, Alameda Labor Council, and community leaders will begin the Yes on Measure E campaign. This initiative aims to maintain the operation of fire stations throughout the city. The campaign will commence this Saturday with a citywide canvassing launch.
